title: Music Box
description: Play Youtube songs inside Minecraft! Server compatible!
body:
# Warning! Music Box won't be updated for 1.21+ versions in favor of [VinURL](https://modrinth.com/mod/vinurl), if you want a similar experience I really recommend this one.

# About the Mod **Music Box** is a Minecraft mod that adds a custom music disc item, allowing you to play any YouTube music in the JukeBox! It is *server compatible*, so you can play music with your friends, add ambient music, create a radio station, and much more! It is a fork of the Fabric mod [URL Music Discs](https://modrinth.com/mod/url-music-discs) and [VinURL](https://modrinth.com/mod/vinurl), ported to Forge with some improvements and new features.
## Dependencies - [DeltaBox Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/deltaboxlib) - [Architectury](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) - If you are using Forge, [Kotlin For Forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/kotlin-for-forge) - If you are using Fabric, [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) ## Recipe
# Features - Right click with a custom music disc to open the configuration screen. - Paste a YouTube link to play the music. - Set up the **Duration**, in seconds (optional) to make it redstone compatible. - Set a **Name** for the music disc. - You can also set a **Radius**, by default it is 30 blocks. (Maximum 999 blocks)

After a disc is saved it can get a random texture out of 40 different variants! And more to be added in the future!

Saving the disc by pressing *esc* will maintain it editable, but if you save it with *enter* it will be locked and signed by you, and can't be edited anymore.

If you have a locked disc you want to recycle, you can always use it to craft a fresh new one! **Secret Features**
Click to reveal You can change the song **Pitch** by ading `&pitch=1.5` at the end of the URL. The pitch value can be any number between 0.5 (scary low) and 2.0 (chipmunk high). The default pitch is 1.0. It will only be changed back to the default pitch if you change the pitch to 1.0, as removing the pitch parameter will not change it back to the default pitch. Music Box also adds secret music discs that can be obtained in random loot chests, or dropped by mobs. These discs are not craftable, and can only be obtained by luck.
# Future The mod is still in development, as of now it only works with YouTube links, but I am planning to add support for other platforms like Discord, SoundCloud, and more. If you have any suggestions, or found bugs, please let me know. New disc variants textures are always welcome if you have new ideas! # Credits [DannBrown](https://x.com/deltaboxlabs) - Forge Port and Improvements
[Hoofer](https://modrinth.com/user/Hoofer) - URL Music Discs Creator
[Plompii](https://modrinth.com/user/Plompii) - VinURL Creator
[Tejty](https://www.curseforge.com/members/tejty/projects) - Some disc textures
